# CommanDeck

> Unified work dashboard for engineers. Integrates Linear tickets, GitHub PRs, Slack, and AI task dispatch.

## Overview
Desktop app (Tauri v2 + React) that aggregates engineering workflow tools. View tickets, review PRs, track AI coding sessions, dispatch tasks to AI agents.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand
- Backend: Rust (Tauri v2)
- Database: SQLite (local)
- Integrations: GitHub API, Linear GraphQL API, Slack API
- AI: Claude Code CLI dispatch with MCP servers

## Architecture
- Orchestrator pattern: Sync Engine, Task Dispatcher, Session Manager, Notification Engine
- API-based data fetching for UI, MCP-based tool access for AI agents
- Local SQLite for caching, session history, settings

## Key Features
- Unified inbox for PRs, tickets, mentions
- Inline PR diff viewer with approve/comment
- Linear ticket management
- AI task dispatch to Claude Code
- Session tracking with logs
- Team view for managers/leads
- Native OS notifications

## Structure
- /src - React frontend
- /src-tauri - Rust backend
- /src/components/views - View components (Inbox, Tickets, PRs, Sessions, Settings)
- /src/stores - Zustand state stores
- /src/types - TypeScript types
- /www - Landing page
